query:
SELECT e.name, e.neighborhood, e.address
FROM establishments e 
WHERE e.source = 'spreadsheet' AND e.categoryId = 2
ORDER BY RAND()
LIMIT 15;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT e.name, e.neighborhood, e.address
FROM establishments e 
WHERE e.source = 'spreadsheet' AND e.categoryId = 2
ORDER BY RAND()
LIMIT 15;
